article.title: NEC closes CSG acquisition
article.summary: NEC has closed its acquisition of CSG Systems, a billing and customer care specialist that counts Comcast among its tier 1 customers. Netcracker, an NEC subsidiary, will now lead the combined business. #pressrelease
article.title_zh: NEC 完成 CSG 收購
article.summary_zh: NEC 已完成對計費和客戶服務專家 CSG Systems 的收購，該公司的客戶包括 Comcast 等一級客戶，NEC 子公司 Netcracker 將領導合併後的業務。

article.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceXAI has been bleeding staff since its merger
article.summary: More than 50 employees have reportedly left Elon Musk’s newly merged SpaceXAI since February, raising questions about burnout, leadership changes, talent poaching, and whether liquidity events weakened retention incentives.
article.title_zh: Elon Musk 的 SpaceXAI 自合併以來一直在流失員工
article.summary_zh: 自2月以來，Elon Musk 新合併的 SpaceXAI 已有超過50名員工離職，引發對員工倦怠、領導層變動、人才挖角以及流動性事件是否削弱留任激勵的疑問。

article.title: Samsung starts winding down chip production six days before planned 18-day strike — company enters 'emergency management mode,' daily losses could hit $2 billion
article.summary: Samsung Electronics has reportedly begun throttling semiconductor output by cutting new wafer input and placing lithography, etching, and cleaning equipment on standby.
article.title_zh: Samsung 在計畫 18 天罷工前六天開始減產晶片 — 公司進入「緊急管理模式」，每日損失可能達 20 億美元
article.summary_zh: Samsung Electronics 據報開始透過減少新晶圓投入並待命光刻、蝕刻和清潔設備來降低半導體產量。

article.title: Louis Rossmann taunts Bambu Lab by hosting banned 3D Printer firmware fork, dares $1 billion company to sue him — more creators pledge support and boycotts, Snapmaker donates equipment to embattled developer
article.summary: Louis Rossmann posted yet another YouTube video taunting the 3D printing juggernaut into taking legal action. In the video, he stated the contentious fork of OrcaSlicer-BambuLab was now hosted on his own FULU (Freedom from Unethical Limitations) Foundation GitHub.
article.title_zh: Louis Rossmann 通過託管被禁 3D 列印機韌體分支來戲弄 Bambu Lab，敢於向 10 億美元公司發起訴訟挑戰 — 更多創作者承諾支援和抵制，Snapmaker 向陷入困境的開發者捐贈設備
article.summary_zh: Louis Rossmann 發佈了另一段 YouTube 影片，戲弄 3D 列印業界巨頭提起法律訴訟。在影片中，他宣佈有爭議的 OrcaSlicer-BambuLab 分支現已託管在他自己的 FULU（Freedom from Unethical Limitations）Foundation GitHub 上。

article.title: Google floats reduced initial 5GB free cloud storage limit, users claim — 15GB to require extra security measures, company confirms it is 'testing a new storage policy for new accounts'
article.summary: While Google has not publicly announced the change, the company confirmed that it is testing a new approach designed to improve account security and data recovery.
article.title_zh: Google 考慮降低免費雲端儲存空間至 5GB，用戶聲稱需要 — 15GB 將需要額外安全措施，公司確認正在「測試新帳戶儲存政策」
article.summary_zh: 雖然 Google 尚未公開宣佈此變更，但公司確認正在測試新方法以改善帳戶安全性和資料恢復功能。

article.title: Why Vision LLMs Force A Rethink Of Edge AI Hardware
article.summary: As vision-centric large language models move on-device, performance measured in raw TOPS is no longer enough. Architectures need to be built around real workloads, memory behavior, and sustained utilization, especially at the edge. Vision LLMs are changing the edge AI equation For the last decade, most edge AI silicon has been built to do one job extremely well: run convolutional networks for image classification, detection, and basic segmentation. That design point is becoming less sufficient as multimodal models move from research into commercial edge systems. Vision LLMs fuse perception, semantics, and reasoning in a single pipeline. They can understand scenes, answer questions about what they see, summarize events across time, and increasingly help determine what to do next. Cameras, v
article.title_zh: 為什麼 Vision LLMs 強制重新思考邊緣 AI 硬體

article.title: Origin Lab raises $8M to help video game companies sell data to world-model builders
article.summary: Origin Lab will serve as a marketplace where AI labs can buy high-quality licensed data, and video-game companies can sell it.
article.title_zh: Origin Lab 融資 800 萬美元，幫助視頻遊戲公司向世界模型開發者銷售數據
article.summary_zh: Origin Lab 將充當市場平台，讓 AI 實驗室購買高質量的授權數據，視頻遊戲公司可以在其中銷售數據。

article.title: Fully-functional RTX 3070 16GB gets frankensteined into existence by harvesting dead PCBs and RX 6800 XT's VRAM chips — doubles frame rate in games like Spider Man 2 at 4K and includes switch for 8GB mode
article.summary: A tech enthusiast has combined an Nvidia GeForce RTX 3070 (8GB) with defective memory and an AMD Radeon RX 6900 XT (16GB) with a damaged GPU to make a working RTX 3070 with 16GB of VRAM.
article.title_zh: 完全可用的 RTX 3070 16GB 通過融合損壞 PCB 和 RX 6800 XT 的 VRAM 晶片而誕生 — 在《蜘蛛人 2》4K 遊戲中幀率翻倍，並包含 8GB 模式開關
article.summary_zh: 一位科技愛好者將 Nvidia GeForce RTX 3070（8GB）的缺陷記憶體與 AMD Radeon RX 6900 XT（16GB）的損壞 GPU 相結合，製造出一個具有 16GB VRAM 的可運行 RTX 3070。

article.title: CoreWeave Sandboxes launches to accelerate reinforcement learning, agent tool use and model evaluation
article.summary: Secure, isolated environments for running AI tool use and evaluation at scale. #pressrelease
article.title_zh: CoreWeave Sandboxes 推出以加速強化學習、代理工具使用和模型評估
article.summary_zh: 為大規模運行 AI 工具使用和評估提供安全隔離的環境。

article.title: ‘Gemini Spark’ is Google’s upcoming AI agent in the Gemini app
article.summary: In the ramp up to I/O 2026, Google has been working on adding a more advanced agent capability to the Gemini app. It now looks like it will be branded as “Gemini Spark.” more…
article.title_zh: 「Gemini Spark」是 Google 即將推出的 Gemini 應用中的 AI 代理
article.summary_zh: 在 I/O 2026 的籌備中，Google 正在為 Gemini 應用增加更多高級代理功能，並將其命名為「Gemini Spark」。

article.title: Your carrier may soon get help from its biggest rivals when you’re off-grid
article.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR AT&T, T-Mobile, and Verizon plan to form a joint venture focused on direct-to-device satellite connectivity. The goal is to reduce US dead zones and improve backup connectivity during emergencies or natural disasters. The plan is still only an agreement in principle, with no confirmed launch timeline yet. We’re required to nail our colors to the mast when it comes to our carrier, but when you’re off grid and struggling to get any reception, you probably don’t care which provider helps you get connected. For all the talk of nationwide coverage, dead zones are still very much a thing, and now AT&T, T-Mobile, and Verizon are planning a rare team-up to tackle the issue. The three biggest US carriers have announced an agreement in princi
article.title_zh: 你的運營商可能很快在離線時獲得最大競爭對手的幫助
article.summary_zh: AT&T、T-Mobile 和 Verizon 計劃成立專注於直接到設備衛星連接的合資企業，以減少美國信號死區。

article.title: Google’s upcoming ‘Gemini Spark’ could soon book your flights and handle your inbox
article.summary: Credit: Megan Ellis / Android Authority TL;DR Google may unveil another Gemini AI agent at I/O 2026 called Gemini Spark. Gemini Spark apparently runs in the background and handles tasks proactively instead of waiting for manual prompts. The AI agent could pull data from linked apps, chat history, schedules, websites, and location info to complete workflows across services. Google seems to be moving fast to turn Gemini from a chatbot into a co-pilot that actually does the work for you. Just in time for Google I/O next week , a new leak has revealed Gemini Spark, an always-on AI agent meant to take care of your digital chores you’re too busy for. A new onboarding screen spotted by X user Fandu in the Gemini web app reveals something called “Gemini Spark” (beta), an always-on AI agent that ha
article.title_zh: Google 即將推出的「Gemini Spark」可能很快預訂你的航班和管理收件箱
article.summary_zh: Google 可能在 I/O 2026 推出另一個名為 Gemini Spark 的 Gemini AI 代理，它可在後台運行並主動處理任務。
